name: Palatschinken from Brigitte Sealing
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour, eggs, water, salt, and sugar until very fluffy.
Melt butter in a skillet and drop the dough by tablespoonfuls into the hot butter. Spread the pancakes thinly on each side. Make the pancakes small. Fry until golden brown and keep warm.
2. Melt chocolate and powdered sugar in a microwave or over hot water. Fill the pancakes with this mixture, roll them up gently, and sprinkle with additional powdered sugar. Serve warm.
This is a classical Austrian and German dessert.
